title: hieracium juranum subsp. amplexifolium
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. amplexifolium is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as a type of hawkweed. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Hieracium juranum subsp. amplexifolium is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
